notes: Decorative container; do not expose as standalone focus target.
Parent heading text should carry semantics.
Legend text and icons should be announced separately.
Dialog container should announce title and modal state in runtime UI.
Parent card content should carry semantics.
Buttons should be separately focusable and labeled.
Runtime toggle state must be announced by the actual control.
Do not rely on chrome alone for selected/unselected meaning.
Selected state should be announced by the actual control.
Tooltip text should remain readable and accessible without art.
Use reduced-motion-safe open/close behavior and keep modal semantics on the runtime component.
